name: toast
description: Promise-aware notifications: toast.promise(p, { loading, success, error }) walks a promise through its states on its own. Tiny module store + a single <Toaster /> live region.

notes: Stack is a labelled region; each toast is role=status (polite) or role=alert (assertive for errors)
Dismiss buttons are real buttons with an accessible label and focus ring
The spinner is decorative and respects prefers-reduced-motion
Errors persist longer; loading toasts never auto-dismiss

intents: show saving / saved / failed feedback automatically
examples: toast.promise(api.save(form), { loading: "Saving…", success: "Saved", error: "Could not save" });
